scripts.setup: npm install && (cd ./node && npm install) && (cd ./web && npm install)
scripts.generate: (cd ./node && npm run generate) && (cd ./web && npm run generate)
scripts.build: (cd ./node && npm run build) && (cd ./web && npm run build)
scripts.lint: (cd ./node && npm run lint) && (cd ./web && npm run lint)
scripts.push: (cd ./node && npm run push) && (cd ./web && npm run push)
scripts.github: rsync -avzh --delete --delete-excluded --exclude=node_modules --exclude=.idea --exclude=.env --exclude=dist README.md LICENSE package.json generate node web ../github/js-client
